(function() {
  function getCookieTheme() {
    var match = document.cookie.match(/(?:^|;\s*)expo-theme=([^;]*)/);
    var val = match && match[1];
    return val === 'dark' || val === 'light' ? val : null;
  }
  var theme = getCookieTheme();
  if (theme === 'dark' || (!theme && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches)) {
    document.documentElement.classList.add('dark-theme');
  } else {
    document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark-theme');
  }
})();

<blockquote class="mb-4 flex gap-2.5 rounded-md border py-3 pr-4 pl-3.5 shadow-xs [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 border-warning bg-warning [&amp;_code]:border-palette-yellow5 [&amp;_code]:bg-palette-yellow4 notifications (remote notifications) functionality provided by <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo-notifications</code> is unavailable in Expo Go on Android from SDK 53. A <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/develop/development-builds/introduction">development build</a> is required to use push notifications. Local notifications (in-app notifications) remain available in Expo Go.</div></blockquote>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="features">Features<a href="#features" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-[1.5ch] pl-[1ch]">
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Schedule a one-off notification for a specific date or some time from now</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Schedule a notification repeating in some time interval (or a calendar date match on iOS)</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Get and set the application badge icon number</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Obtain a native device push token, so you can send push notifications with FCM (for Android) and APNs (for iOS)</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Obtain an Expo push token, so you can send push notifications with <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/push-notifications/sending-notifications">Expo Push Service</a></li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Listen to incoming notifications in the foreground and background</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Listen to interactions with notifications</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Handle notifications when the app is in the foreground</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Imperatively dismiss notifications from Notification Center/tray</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Create, update, and delete <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/notifications/channels">Android notification channels</a></li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Set custom icon and color for notifications on Android</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="installation">Installation<a href="#installation" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>

text-palette-white" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="text-icon-default translate-z icon-sm shrink-0" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 border-none! bg-transparent! whitespace-pre text-secondary! select-none" data-text="true" data-md="skip">- </code><code class="text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 border-none! bg-transparent! whitespace-pre text-default" data-text="true"><span class="token function">npx</span> expo install expo-notifications</code></div></div></div><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word" data-text="true">If you are installing this in an <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/bare/overview">existing React Native app</a>,<!-- --> <!-- -->make sure to<!-- --> <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/bare/installing-expo-modules">install <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo</code></a> <!-- -->in your project.</p>
<br/>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Then proceed to <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#configuration">configuration</a> to set up the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#app-config">config plugin</a> and
obtain the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#credentials">credentials</a> for push notifications.</p>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="known-issues-"><span>Known issues <span class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] inline-flex items-center" data-text="true"><div data-md="platform-badge" class="mr-2 inline-flex min-h-5.25 items-center gap-1 rounded-full border px-1.75 py-0.5 select-none last:mr-0 [table_&amp;]:mt-0 [table_&amp;]:px-1.5 [table_&amp;]:py-0.5 [h3_&amp;]:last-of-type:mr-0 [h4_&amp;]:last-of-type:mr-0 bg-palette-green3 text-palette-green12 border-palette-green4"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="translate-z mt-[-0.5px] icon-2xs shrink-0 text-palette-green12 opacity-80" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="android-custom-icon"><path id="Vector" fill="currentColor" d="M17.0628 15.073C16.5576 15.073 16.1467 14.6605 16.1467 14.1537C16.1467 13.6469 16.5576 13.2347 17.0628 13.2347C17.5679 13.2347 17.9788 13.6469 17.9788 14.1537C17.9788 14.6605 17.5679 15.073 17.0628 15.073ZM6.9372 15.073C6.43204 15.073 6.02116 14.6605 6.02116 14.1537C6.02116 13.6469 6.43204 13.2347 6.9372 13.2347C7.44234 13.2347 7.85325 13.6469 7.85325 14.1537C7.85325 14.6605 7.44234 15.073 6.9372 15.073ZM17.3913 9.53705L19.2222 6.35598C19.3272 6.17313 19.2647 5.93959 19.0828 5.834C18.9008 5.72871 18.6677 5.79135 18.5624 5.97389L16.7087 9.19523C15.291 8.54619 13.6989 8.18468 12 8.18468C10.3011 8.18468 8.70893 8.54619 7.29131 9.19523L5.43751 5.97389C5.33226 5.79135 5.09916 5.72871 4.9172 5.834C4.73524 5.93959 4.67251 6.17313 4.77776 6.35598L6.60865 9.53705C3.46479 11.2524 1.31456 14.4454 1 18.2177H23C22.6851 14.4454 20.5349 11.2524 17.3913 9.53705Z"></path></g></svg><span class="text-xs! leading-none! font-normal whitespace-nowrap">Android</span></div></span></span><a href="#known-issues-" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">When launching the app from a push notification in <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Android development builds</span>, the splash screen may fail to display correctly about 70% of the time. The icon and fade animation may not appear as expected.</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-[1.5ch] pl-[1ch]">
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Icon may be missing</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Fade animation may not run</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Only the background color may flash briefly</li>
</ul>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">This issue only affects debug builds and does not occur in release builds. To workaround it, test notification launches in release mode (<code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">npx expo run:android --variant release</code>) for accurate behavior.</p>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="usage">Usage<a href="#usage" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Check out the example Snack below to see Notifications in action. Push notifications work on physical devices, Android emulators with Google Play services, and iOS simulators on Xcode 14 or later (macOS 13+, iOS 16+).</p>

p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token punctuation">{</span> useState<span class="token punctuation">,</span> useEffect <span class="token punctuation">}</span></span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'react'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token punctuation">{</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Text</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">View</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Button</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Platform</span> <span class="token punctuation">}</span></span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'react-native'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword module">as</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Notifications</span></span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-notifications'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token maybe-class-name">Constants</span></span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-constants'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token maybe-class-name">Notifications</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token method function property-access">setNotificationHandler</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token function-variable function">handleNotification</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token keyword">async</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token arrow operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>

<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="present-a-local-in-app-notification-to-the-user">Present a local (in-app) notification to the user<a href="#present-a-local-in-app-notification-to-the-user" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> Notifications <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-notifications'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token comment">// First, set the handler that will cause the notification</span>
<span class="token comment">// to show the alert</span>
Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">setNotificationHandler</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token function-variable function">handleNotification</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token keyword">async</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    shouldPlaySound<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token boolean">false</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    shouldSetBadge<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token boolean">false</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    shouldShowBanner<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token boolean">true</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    shouldShowList<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token boolean">true</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token comment">// Second, call scheduleNotificationAsync()</span>
Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">scheduleNotificationAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  content<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    title<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'Look at that notification'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    body<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"I'm so proud of myself!"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  trigger<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token keyword">null</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="handle-push-notifications-with-navigation">Handle push notifications with navigation<a href="#handle-push-notifications-with-navigation" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">If you&#x27;d like to deep link to a specific screen in your app when you receive a push notification, you can configure either of Expo&#x27;s navigation systems to do that.</p>

<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token punctuation">{</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Linking</span> <span class="token punctuation">}</span></span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'react-native'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword module">as</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Notifications</span></span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-notifications'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token punctuation">{</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">NavigationContainer</span> <span class="token punctuation">}</span></span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'@react-navigation/native'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">export</span> <span class="token keyword">default</span> <span class="token keyword">function</span> <span class="token function">App</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>
    <span class="token operator">&lt;</span><span class="token maybe-class-name">NavigationContainer</span>
      linking<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
        config<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
          <span class="token comment">// Configuration for linking</span>
        <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
        <span class="token keyword">async</span> <span class="token function">getInitialURL</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
          <span class="token comment">// First, you may want to do the default deep link handling</span>
          <span class="token comment">// Check if app was opened from a deep link</span>
          <span class="token keyword">const</span> url <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">await</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Linking</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token method function property-access">getInitialURL</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>url <span class="token operator">!=</span> <span class="token keyword">null</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> url<span class="token punctuation">;</span>
          <span class="token punctuation">}</span>

          <span class="token comment">// Handle URL from expo push notifications</span>
          <span class="token keyword">const</span> response <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Notifications</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token method function property-access">getLastNotificationResponse</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          <span class="token keyword">return</span> response<span class="token operator">?.</span>notification<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token property-access">request</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token property-access">content</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token property-access">data</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token property-access">url</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
        <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
        <span class="token function">subscribe</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>listener<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
          <span class="token keyword">const</span> <span class="token function-variable function">onReceiveURL</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span> url <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> url<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token builtin">string</span> <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token arrow operator">=></span> <span class="token function">listener</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>url<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          <span class="token comment">// Listen to incoming links from deep linking</span>
          <span class="token keyword">const</span> eventListenerSubscription <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Linking</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token method function property-access">addEventListener</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'url'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> onReceiveURL<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          <span class="token comment">// Listen to expo push notifications</span>
          <span class="token keyword">const</span> subscription <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Notifications</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token method function property-access">addNotificationResponseReceivedListener</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>response <span class="token arrow operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
            <span class="token keyword">const</span> url <span class="token operator">=</span> response<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token property-access">notification</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token property-access">request</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token property-access">content</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token property-access">data</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token property-access">url</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

            <span class="token comment">// Any custom logic to see whether the URL needs to be handled</span>
            <span class="token comment">//...</span>

            <span class="token comment">// Let React Navigation handle the URL</span>
            <span class="token function">listener</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>url<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
          <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token arrow operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
            <span class="token comment">// Clean up the event listeners</span>
            eventListenerSubscription<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token method function property-access">remove</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
            subscription<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token method function property-access">remove</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
          <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
        <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
      <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token operator">></span>
      <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token comment">/* Your app content */</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
    <span class="token tag"><span class="token tag"><span class="token punctuation">&lt;/</span><span class="token class-name">NavigationContainer</span></span><span class="token punctuation">></span></span>
  <span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">See more details on <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://reactnavigation.org/docs/deep-linking/#third-party-integrations">React Navigation documentation</a>.</p></div></div></div>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="configuration">Configuration<a href="#configuration" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="credentials">Credentials<a href="#credentials" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Follow the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/push-notifications/push-notifications-setup#get-credentials-for-development-builds">setup guide</a>.</p>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="app-config">App config<a href="#app-config" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">To configure <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo-notifications</code>, use the built-in <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/config-plugins/introduction">config plugin</a> in the app config (<span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">app.json</span> or <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">app.config.js</span>) for <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/build/introduction">EAS Build</a> or with <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">npx expo run:[android|ios]</code>. The plugin allows you to configure the following properties that cannot be set at runtime and require building a new app binary to take effect:</p>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link <p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">The iOS APNs entitlement is <em>always</em> set to &#x27;development&#x27;. Xcode automatically changes this to &#x27;production&#x27; in the archive generated by a release build.

<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="permissions">Permissions<a href="#permissions" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="android">Android<a href="#android" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-[1.5ch] pl-[1ch]">
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">On Android, this module requires permission to subscribe to the device boot. It&#x27;s used to set up scheduled notifications when the device (re)starts.
The <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED</code> permission is added automatically through the library&#x27;s <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">AndroidManifest.xml</span>.</p>
</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Starting from Android 12 (API level 31), to schedule a notification that triggers at an exact time, you need to add
<code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">&lt;uses-permission android:name=&quot;android.permission.SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM&quot;/&gt;</code> to <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">AndroidManifest.xml</span>.
Read more about the <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://developer.android.com/about/versions/12/behavior-changes-12#exact-alarm-permission">exact alarm permission</a>.</p>
</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">On Android 13, app users must opt-in to receive notifications via a permissions prompt automatically triggered by the operating system.
This prompt will not appear until at least one notification channel is created. The <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">setNotificationChannelAsync</code> must be called before
<code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">getDevicePushTokenAsync</code> or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">getExpoPushTokenAsync</code> to obtain a push token. You can read more about the new notification permission behavior for Android 13
in the <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/notifications/notification-permission#new-apps">official documentation</a>.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="table-wrapper mb-4 overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden rounded-md border border-default shadow-xs"><table class="w-full rounded-none border-0 text-sm text-default [&amp;_p]:text-sm mb-4!" data-text="true">Allows an application to receive the Intent.ACTION_BOOT_COMPLETED that is broadcast after the system finishes booting.</p><blockquote class="flex gap-2.5 rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle py-3 pr-4 pl-3.5 shadow-xs [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! mt-1.5 mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 mt-1 select-none icon-sm text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full leading-normal text-default last:mb-0"><span>Allows an application to receive the <code translate="no" dir="ltr"><a href="https://developer.android.com/reference/android/content/Intent#ACTION_BOOT_COMPLETED">Intent.ACTION_BOOT_COMPLETED</a></code> that is broadcast after the system finishes booting. If you don't request this permission, you will not receive the broadcast at that time. Though holding this permission does not have any security implications, it can have a negative impact on the user experience by increasing the amount of time it takes the system to start and allowing applications to have themselves running without the user being aware of them. As such, you must explicitly declare your use of this facility to make that visible to the user.</span></div></blockquote></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-text="true" id="permission-schedule_exact_alarm"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM</code><a href="#permission-schedule_exact_alarm" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5 inline-flex items-center"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></p></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Allows applications to use exact alarm APIs.</p></td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="ios">iOS<a href="#ios" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">No usage description is required, see <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#fetch-information-about-notifications-related-permissions">notification-related permissions</a>.</p>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="interpret-the-ios-permissions-response">Interpret the iOS permissions response<a href="#interpret-the-ios-permissions-response" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">On iOS, permissions for sending notifications are a little more granular than they are on Android. This is why you should rely on the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">NotificationPermissionsStatus</code>&#x27;s <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">ios.status</code> field, instead of the root <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">status</code> field.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">This value will be one of the following, accessible under <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">Notifications.IosAuthorizationStatus</code>:</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-[1.5ch] pl-[1ch]">
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">NOT_DETERMINED</code>: The user hasn&#x27;t yet made a choice about whether the app is allowed to schedule notifications</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">DENIED</code>: The app isn&#x27;t authorized to schedule or receive notifications</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">AUTHORIZED</code>: The app is authorized to schedule or receive notifications</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">PROVISIONAL</code>: The app is provisionally authorized to post noninterruptive user notifications</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">EPHEMERAL</code>: The app is authorized to schedule or receive notifications for a limited amount of time</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="notification-events-listeners">Notification events listeners<a href="#notification-events-listeners" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Notification events include incoming notifications, interactions your users perform with notifications (this can be tapping on a notification, or interacting with it via <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#manage-notification-categories-interactive-notifications">notification categories</a>), and rare occasions when your notifications may be dropped.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Several listeners are exposed and documented in the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/push-notifications/what-you-need-to-know#push-notification-behaviors">Push notification behaviors</a> section.</p>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="headless-background-notifications">Headless (Background) notifications<a href="#headless-background-notifications" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">See the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/push-notifications/what-you-need-to-know#headless-background-notifications">definition</a> of Headless Background Notifications in the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/push-notifications/what-you-need-to-know">What you need to know</a> guide.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">To handle notifications while the app is in the background or not running, you need to do the following:</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-[1.5ch] pl-[1ch]">
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Add <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo-task-manager</code> package to your project.</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true"><a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#background-notification-configuration">Configure background notifications</a>.</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">In your application code, set up a <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#registertaskasynctaskname">background task</a> to run when the notification is received.</li>
</ul>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Then send a push notification which:</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-[1.5ch] pl-[1ch]">
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Contains only the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">data</code> key (no <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">title</code>, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">body</code>)</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Has <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">_contentAvailable: true</code> set for iOS — see the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/push-notifications/sending-notifications#message-request-format">Expo push notification service payload format</a></li>
</ul>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="background-notification-configuration"><span>Background notification configuration <span class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] inline-flex items-center" data-text="true"><div data-md="platform-badge" class="mr-2 inline-flex min-h-5.25 items-center gap-1 rounded-full border items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">To be able to use background push notifications on iOS, the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">remote-notification</code> value needs to be present in the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">UIBackgroundModes</code> array in your app&#x27;s <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Info.plist</span> file.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">If you&#x27;re using <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/workflow/continuous-native-generation">CNG</a></span>, set the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#configurable-properties"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">enableBackgroundRemoteNotifications</code> property</a> of the config plugin to true, and the correct configuration will be applied automatically by prebuild.</p>

<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="additional-information">Additional information<a href="#additional-information" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="set-custom-notification-sounds">Set custom notification sounds<a href="#set-custom-notification-sounds" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">To add custom push notification sounds to your app, add the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo-notifications</code> plugin to your <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">app.json</span> file and then under the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">sounds</code> key, provide an array of local paths to sound files that can be used as custom notification sounds. These local paths are local to your project.</p>
<div class="mb-4 flex flex-col last:mb-0"><div data-md="snippet-header" class="flex min-h-10 justify-between overflow-hidden border border-default bg-default rounded-t-md border-b-0 pl-3"><span 8.00007H19.7305M14 17.5L16.5 15L14 12.5M10 12.5L7.5 15L10 17.5M20 9.98822V17.2C20 18.8802 20 19.7202 19.673 20.362C19.3854 20.9265 18.9265 21.3854 18.362 21.673C17.7202 22 16.8802 22 15.2 22H8.8C7.11984 22 6.27976 22 5.63803 21.673C5.07354 21.3854 4.6146 20.9265 4.32698 20.362C4 19.7202 4 18.8802 4 17.2V6.8C4 5.11984 4 4.27976 4.32698 3.63803C4.6146 3.07354 5.07354 2.6146 5.63803 3.6V4.4C8 4.96005 8 5.24008 8.10899 5.45399C8.20487 5.64215 8.35785 5.79513 8.54601 5.89101C8.75992 6 9.03995 6 9.6 6Z"></path></g></svg><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none"><p
