prose-code:px-0! p-0"><pre data-md-lang="json" class="relative whitespace-pre" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token property">"expo"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token property">"plugins"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span>
      <span class="token punctuation">[</span>
        <span class="token string">"expo-notifications"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
        <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
          <span class="token property">"sounds"</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"local/path/to/mySoundFile.wav"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
      <span class="token punctuation">]</span>
    <span class="token punctuation">]</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">After building your app, the array of files will be available for use in both <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#notificationcontentinput"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">NotificationContentInput</code></a> and <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#notificationchannelinput"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">NotificationChannelInput</code></a>.
You only need to provide the base filename. Here&#x27;s an example using the config above:</p>
<pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">await</span> Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">setNotificationChannelAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'new_emails'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  name<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'E-mail notifications'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  importance<span class="token operator">:</span> Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span>AndroidImportance<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token constant">HIGH</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  sound<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'mySoundFile.wav'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token comment">// Provide ONLY the base filename</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">await</span> Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">scheduleNotificationAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  content<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    title<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"You've got mail! 📬"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    sound<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'mySoundFile.wav'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token comment">// Provide ONLY the base filename</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  trigger<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    type<span class="token operator">:</span> Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span>SchedulableTriggerInputTypes<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token constant">TIME_INTERVAL</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    seconds<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    channelId<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'new_emails'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">You can also manually add notification files to your Android and iOS projects if you prefer:</p>
<details id="manually-adding-notification-sounds-on-android" class="mb-3 scroll-m-4 rounded-md border border-default bg-default p-0 [&amp;[open]]:shadow-xs [h4+&amp;]:mt-3 [li&gt;&amp;]:mt-3 [p+&amp;]:mt-3" data-md="collapsible"><summary class="group m-0 grid cursor-pointer grid-cols-[min-content_auto_min-content_1fr] items-center rounded-md bg-subtle p-1.5 pr-3 [details[open]&gt;&amp;]:rounded-b-none [&amp;_h4]:my-0 [&amp;_code]:mt-px [&amp;_code]:inline [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_code]:pb-px [&amp;_code]:text-[85%] [&amp;_code]:leading-snug"><div class="mt-1.25 mr-2 ml-1.5 self-baseline"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-default -rotate-90 transition-transform duration-200 [details[open]&gt;summary_&amp;]:rotate-0" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="triangle-down-custom-icon"><path id="Vector 250" fill="currentColor" d="M18.8831 9.43005H5.11694L12 16.3131L18.8831 9.43005Z"></path></g></svg></div><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium relative mr-1 inline scroll-m-5 items-center gap-1.5 group-hover:text-secondary group-hover:[&amp;_code]:text-secondary" data-text="true">Manually adding notification sounds on Android</span><a href="#manually-adding-notification-sounds-on-android" class="ml-auto inline rounded-md p-1 hocus:bg-element" aria-label="Permalink"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="invisible inline-flex icon-sm group-hover:visible group-focus-visible:visible" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></a><div></div></summary><div class="overflow-hidden" style="height:0px"><div class="px-5 py-4 [&amp;_p]:ml-0 [&amp;_pre&gt;pre]:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-1!"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">On Androids 8.0+, playing a custom sound for a notification requires more than setting the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">sound</code> property on the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">NotificationContentInput</code>.
You will also need to configure the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">NotificationChannel</code> with the appropriate <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">sound</code>, and use it when sending/scheduling the notification.</p><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">For the example below to work, you would place your <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">email_sound.wav</span> file in <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">android/app/src/main/res/raw/</span>.</p><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token comment">// Prepare the notification channel</span>
<span class="token keyword">await</span> Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">setNotificationChannelAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'new_emails'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  name<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'E-mail notifications'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  importance<span class="token operator">:</span> Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span>AndroidImportance<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token constant">HIGH</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  sound<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'email_sound.wav'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token comment">// &lt;- for Android 8.0+, see channelId property below</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token comment">// Eg. schedule the notification</span>
<span class="token keyword">await</span> Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">scheduleNotificationAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  content<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    title<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"You've got mail! 📬"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    body<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'Open the notification to read them all'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    sound<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'email_sound.wav'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token comment">// &lt;- for Android below 8.0</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  trigger<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    type<span class="token operator">:</span> Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span>SchedulableTriggerInputTypes<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token constant">TIME_INTERVAL</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    seconds<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    channelId<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'new_emails'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token comment">// &lt;- for Android 8.0+, see definition above</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></details>
<details id="manually-adding-notification-sounds-on-ios" class="mb-3 scroll-m-4 rounded-md border border-default bg-default p-0 [&amp;[open]]:shadow-xs [h4+&amp;]:mt-3 [li&gt;&amp;]:mt-3 [p+&amp;]:mt-3" data-md="collapsible"><summary class="group m-0 grid cursor-pointer grid-cols-[min-content_auto_min-content_1fr] items-center rounded-md bg-subtle p-1.5 pr-3 [details[open]&gt;&amp;]:rounded-b-none [&amp;_h4]:my-0 [&amp;_code]:mt-px [&amp;_code]:inline [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_code]:pb-px [&amp;_code]:text-[85%] [&amp;_code]:leading-snug"><div group-hover:[&amp;_code]:text-secondary" data-text="true">Manually adding notification sounds on iOS</span><a href="#manually-adding-notification-sounds-on-ios" class="ml-auto inline rounded-md p-1 hocus:bg-element" aria-label="Permalink"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="invisible inline-flex icon-sm group-hover:visible group-focus-visible:visible" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></a><div></div></summary><div class="overflow-hidden" style="height:0px"><div class="px-5 py-4 [&amp;_p]:ml-0 [&amp;_pre&gt;pre]:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-1!"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">On iOS, all that&#x27;s needed is to place your sound file in your Xcode project (see the screenshot below),
and then specify the sound file in your <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">NotificationContentInput</code>, like this:</p><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">await</span> Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">scheduleNotificationAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  content<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    title<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">"You've got mail! 📬"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    body<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'Open the notification to read them all'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    sound<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'notification.wav'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  trigger<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token comment">// ...</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre><figure class="my-5 cursor-pointer rounded-lg py-2.5 text-center bg-subtle"><button type="button"><img src="/static/images/notification-sound-ios.jpeg" alt="notification.wav inside of app resources in Xcode project organizer" class="inline rounded-md transition-opacity duration-default ease-in-out hover:opacity-80 max-w-[305px]"/></button></figure></div></div></details>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="push-notification-payload-specification">Push notification payload specification<a href="#push-notification-payload-specification" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">See <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/push-notifications/sending-notifications#message-request-format">Message request format</a>.</p>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="manage-notification-categories-for-interactive-notifications">Manage notification categories for interactive notifications<a href="#manage-notification-categories-for-interactive-notifications" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Notification categories allow you to create interactive push notifications, so that a user can respond directly to the incoming notification
either via buttons or a text response. A category defines the set of actions a user can take, and then those actions are applied to a notification
by specifying the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">categoryIdentifier</code> in the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#notificationcontent"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">NotificationContent</code></a>.</p>
<figure class="my-5 cursor-pointer rounded-lg py-2.5 text-center bg-subtle"><button type="button"><img src="/static/images/sdk/notifications/categories.png" alt="Image of notification categories on Android and iOS" class="inline rounded-md transition-opacity duration-default ease-in-out hover:opacity-80 max-w-[800px]"/></button></figure>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">On iOS, notification categories also allow you to customize your notifications further. With each category, not only can you set interactive actions a user can take, but you can also configure things like the placeholder text to display when the user disables notification previews for your app.</p>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="platform-specific-guides">Platform-specific guides<a href="#platform-specific-guides" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="handling-notification-channels"><span>Handling notification channels <span class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] inline-flex items-center" data-text="true"><div data-md="platform-badge" class="mr-2 inline-flex min-h-5.25 items-center gap-1 rounded-full border px-1.75 py-0.5 select-none last:mr-0 [table_&amp;]:mt-0 [table_&amp;]:px-1.5 [table_&amp;]:py-0.5 [h3_&amp;]:last-of-type:mr-0 [h4_&amp;]:last-of-type:mr-0 bg-palette-green3 text-palette-green12 border-palette-green4"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="translate-z mt-[-0.5px] icon-2xs shrink-0 text-palette-green12 opacity-80" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="android-custom-icon"><path id="Vector" fill="currentColor" d="M17.0628 15.073C16.5576 15.073 16.1467 14.6605 16.1467 14.1537C16.1467 13.6469 16.5576 13.2347 17.0628 13.2347C17.5679 13.2347 17.9788 13.6469 17.9788 14.1537C17.9788 14.6605 17.5679 15.073 17.0628 15.073ZM6.9372 15.073C6.43204 15.073 6.02116 14.6605 6.02116 14.1537C6.02116 13.6469 6.43204 13.2347 6.9372 13.2347C7.44234 13.2347 7.85325 13.6469 7.85325 14.1537C7.85325 14.6605 7.44234 15.073 6.9372 15.073ZM17.3913 9.53705L19.2222 6.35598C19.3272 6.17313 19.2647 5.93959 19.0828 5.834C18.9008 5.72871 18.6677 5.79135 18.5624 5.97389L16.7087 9.19523C15.291 8.54619 13.6989 8.18468 12 8.18468C10.3011 8.18468 8.70893 8.54619 7.29131 9.19523L5.43751 5.97389C5.33226 5.79135 5.09916 5.72871 4.9172 5.834C4.73524 5.93959 4.67251 6.17313 4.77776 6.35598L6.60865 9.53705C3.46479 11.2524 1.31456 14.4454 1 18.2177H23C22.6851 14.4454 20.5349 11.2524 17.3913 9.53705Z"></path></g></svg><span class="text-xs! leading-none! font-normal whitespace-nowrap">Android 8+</span></div></span></span><a href="#handling-notification-channels" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Starting in Android 8.0 (API level 26), all notifications must be assigned to a channel. For each channel,
you can set the visual and auditory behavior that is applied to all notifications in that channel.
Then, users can change these settings and decide which notification channels from your app should be intrusive or visible at all,
as <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://developer.android.com/training/notify-user/channels">Android developer docs</a> states.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">If you do not specify a notification channel, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo-notifications</code> will create a fallback channel for you, named <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Miscellaneous</span>.
We encourage you to always ensure appropriate channels with informative names are set up for the application and to always send notifications to these channels.</p>
<blockquote class="mb-4 flex gap-2.5 rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle py-3 pr-4 pl-3.5 shadow-xs [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0!" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 mt-1 select-none icon-sm text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full leading-normal text-default last:mb-0">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Calling these methods is a no-op for platforms that do not support this feature (Android below version 8.0 (26) and iOS).</p>
</div></blockquote>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="custom-notification-icon-and-colors"><span>Custom notification icon and colors <span class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] inline-flex items-center" data-text="true"><div data-md="platform-badge" class="mr-2 inline-flex min-h-5.25 items-center gap-1 rounded-full border px-1.75 py-0.5 select-none last:mr-0 [table_&amp;]:mt-0 [table_&amp;]:px-1.5 [table_&amp;]:py-0.5 [h3_&amp;]:last-of-type:mr-0 [h4_&amp;]:last-of-type:mr-0 bg-palette-green3 text-palette-green12 border-palette-green4"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="translate-z mt-[-0.5px] icon-2xs shrink-0 text-palette-green12 opacity-80" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="android-custom-icon"><path id="Vector" fill="currentColor" d="M17.0628 15.073C16.5576 15.073 16.1467 14.6605 16.1467 14.1537C16.1467 13.6469 16.5576 13.2347 17.0628 13.2347C17.5679 13.2347 17.9788 13.6469 17.9788 14.1537C17.9788 14.6605 17.5679 15.073 17.0628 15.073ZM6.9372 15.073C6.43204 15.073 6.02116 14.6605 6.02116 14.1537C6.02116 13.6469 6.43204 13.2347 6.9372 13.2347C7.44234 13.2347 7.85325 13.6469 7.85325 14.1537C7.85325 14.6605 7.44234 15.073 6.9372 15.073ZM17.3913 9.53705L19.2222 6.35598C19.3272 6.17313 19.2647 5.93959 19.0828 5.834C18.9008 5.72871 18.6677 5.79135 18.5624 5.97389L16.7087 9.19523C15.291 8.54619 13.6989 8.18468 12 8.18468C10.3011 8.18468 8.70893 8.54619 7.29131 9.19523L5.43751 5.97389C5.33226 5.79135 5.09916 5.72871 4.9172 5.834C4.73524 5.93959 4.67251 6.17313 4.77776 6.35598L6.60865 9.53705C3.46479 11.2524 1.31456 14.4454 1 18.2177H23C22.6851 14.4454 20.5349 11.2524 17.3913 9.53705Z"></path></g></svg><span class="text-xs! leading-none! font-normal whitespace-nowrap">Android</span></div></span></span><a href="#custom-notification-icon-and-colors" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h3>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">You can configure the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/config/app#notification"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">notification.icon</code></a> and <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/config/app#notification"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">notification.color</code></a> keys in the project&#x27;s <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">app.json</span> if you are using <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/workflow/continuous-native-generation">Expo Prebuild</a> or by using the <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#configurable-properties"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo-notifications</code> config plugin directly</a>. These are build-time settings, so you&#x27;ll need to recompile your native Android app with <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">eas build -p android</code> or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">npx expo run:android</code> to see the changes.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">For your notification icon, make sure you follow <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://material.io/design/iconography/product-icons.html#design-principles">Google&#x27;s design guidelines</a>
(the icon must be all white with a transparent background) or else it may not be displayed as intended.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">You can also set a custom notification color <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">per-notification</span> directly in your <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/notifications#notificationcontentinput"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">NotificationContentInput</code></a> under the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">color</code> attribute.</p>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="api">API<a href="#api" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<pre data-md-lang="js" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword module">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword module">as</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Notifications</span></span> <span class="token keyword module">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-notifications'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre>

[table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">In rare situations, a push token may be changed by the push notification service while the app is running.
When a token is rolled, the old one becomes invalid and sending notifications to it will fail.
A push token listener will let you handle this situation gracefully by registering the new token with your backend right away.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M4 4V5.4C4 8.76031 4 10.4405 4.65396 11.7239C5.2292 12.8529 6.14708 13.7708 7.27606 14.346C8.55953 15 10.2397 15 13.6 15H20M15 20L20 15L15 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">EventSubscription</code></div><div class="mt-1.5 mb-1 flex flex-col pl-6"><div class=""><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">An <a href="#eventsubscription" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">EventSubscription</code></a> object represents the subscription of the provided listener.</p></div></div><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-secondary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="code-square-01-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14.5 15L17.5 12L14.5 9M9.5 9L6.5 12L9.5 15M7.8 21H16.2C17.8802 21 18.7202 21 19.362 20.673C19.9265 20.3854 20.3854 19.9265 20.673 19.362C21 18.7202 21 17.8802 21 16.2V7.8C21 6.11984 21 5.27976 20.673 4.63803C20.3854 4.07354 19.9265 3.6146 19.362 3.32698C18.7202 3 17.8802 3 16.2 3H7.8C6.11984 3 5.27976 3 4.63803 3.32698C4.07354 3.6146 3.6146 4.07354 3.32698 4.63803C3 5.27976 3 6.11984 3 7.8V16.2C3 17.8802 3 18.7202 3.32698 19.362C3.6146 19.9265 4.07354 20.3854 4.63803 20.673C5.27976 21 6.11984 21 7.8 21Z"></path></g></svg>Example</span></p><pre data-md-lang="jsx" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword module">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token maybe-class-name">React</span></span> <span class="token keyword module">from</span> <span class="token string">'react'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

[&amp;_blockquote_div]:text-sm [&amp;_blockquote_code]:px-1 [&amp;_blockquote_code]:py-0"><thead class="border-b border-b-default bg-subtle"><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><th class="border-r [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Object allowing you to pass in push notification configuration.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">{}</code></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><br/><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Returns an Expo token that can be used to send a push notification to the device using Expo&#x27;s push notifications service.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">This method makes requests to the Expo&#x27;s servers. It can get rejected in cases where the request itself fails
(for example, due to the device being offline, experiencing a network timeout, or other HTTPS request failures).
To provide offline support to your users, you should <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">try/catch</code> this method and implement retry logic to attempt
to get the push token later, once the device is back online.</p>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">For Expo&#x27;s backend to be able to send notifications to your app, you will need to provide it with push notification keys.
For more information, see <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/push-notifications/push-notifications-setup#get-credentials-for-development-builds">credentials</a> in the push notifications setup.</p>
</div></blockquote><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" Applicable only to Firebase Cloud Messaging which we use as a notifications service on Android. It corresponds to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">onDeletedMessages()</code> callback.

text-palette-blue12 border-palette-blue4"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="translate-z mt-[-0.5px] icon-2xs shrink-0 text-palette-blue12 opacity-80" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="apple-custom-icon"><path id="Vector" fill="currentColor" d="M20.4478 17.3538C20.1312 18.0852 19.7564 18.7585 19.3222 19.3775C18.7303 20.2214 18.2457 20.8055 17.8722 21.1299C17.2933 21.6623 16.673 class="text-xs! leading-none! font-normal whitespace-nowrap">iOS</span></div></span></div></div><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A React hook which returns the notification response that was received most recently
(a notification response designates an interaction with a notification, such as tapping on it).</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">To clear the last notification response, use <a href="#notificationsclearlastnotificationresponseasync" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">clearLastNotificationResponseAsync()</code></a>.</p>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">If you don&#x27;t want to use a hook, you can use <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Notifications.getLastNotificationResponseAsync()</code> instead.</p>
</div></blockquote><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M4 4V5.4C4 8.76031 4 10.4405 4.65396 11.7239C5.2292 12.8529 6.14708 13.7708 7.27606 14.346C8.55953 15 10.2397 15 13.6 15H20M15 20L20 15L15 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">MaybeNotificationResponse</code></div><div class="mt-1.5 mb-1 flex flex-col pl-6"><div class=""><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The hook may return one of these three types/values:</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0">
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">undefined</code> - until we&#x27;re sure of what to return,</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">null</code> - if no notification response has been received yet,</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">a <a href="#notificationresponse" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">NotificationResponse</code></a> object - if a notification response was received.</li>
</ul></div></div><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-secondary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="code-square-01-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14.5 15L17.5 12L14.5 9M9.5 9L6.5 12L9.5 15M7.8 21H16.2C17.8802 21 18.7202 21 19.362 20.673C19.9265 20.3854 20.3854 19.9265 20.673 19.362C21 18.7202 21 17.8802 21 16.2V7.8C21 6.11984 21 5.27976 20.673 4.63803C20.3854 4.07354 19.9265 3.6146 19.362 3.32698C18.7202 3 17.8802 3 16.2 3H7.8C6.11984 3 5.27976 3 4.63803 3.32698C4.07354 3.6146 3.6146 4.07354 3.32698 4.63803C3 5.27976 3 6.11984 3 7.8V16.2C3 17.8802 3 18.7202 3.32698 19.362C3.6146 19.9265 4.07354 20.3854 4.63803 20.673C5.27976 21 6.11984 21 7.8 21Z"></path></g></svg>Example</span></p><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Responding to a notification tap by opening a URL that could be put into the notification&#x27;s <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">data</code>
(opening the URL is your responsibility and is not a part of the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">expo-notifications</code> API):</p>
<pre data-md-lang="jsx" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword module">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword module">as</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Notifications</span></span> <span class="token keyword module">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-notifications'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

  <span class="token keyword control-flow">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>

<span class="token punctuation">}</span>

class="text-xs! leading-none! font-normal whitespace-nowrap">iOS</span></div></span></div></div><div class="table-wrapper mb-4 overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden rounded-md border border-default shadow-xs mx-4 mt-0.5"><table class="w-full rounded-none border-0 text-sm text-default [&amp;_p]:text-sm [&amp;_li]:text-sm [&amp;_span]:text-sm [&amp;_code_span]:text-xs [&amp;_strong]:text-sm [&amp;_blockquote_div]:text-sm [&amp;_blockquote_code]:px-1 [&amp;_blockquote_code]:py-0"><thead class="border-b border-b-default bg-subtle"><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Parameter</th><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Type</th><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true" data-md="api-param-name">handler</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><span>null<span class="text-quaternary"> | </span></span><span><a href="#notificationhandler" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">NotificationHandler</a></span></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0!"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A single parameter which should be either <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">null</code> (if you want to clear the handler) or a <a href="#notificationhandler" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">NotificationHandler</code></a> object.</p></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><br/><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">When a notification is received while the app is running, using this function you can set a callback that will decide
whether the notification should be shown to the user or not.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">When a notification is received, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">handleNotification</code> is called with the incoming notification as an argument.
The function should respond with a behavior object within 3 seconds, otherwise, the notification will be discarded.
If the notification is handled successfully, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">handleSuccess</code> is called with the identifier of the notification,
otherwise (or on timeout) <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">handleError</code> will be called.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The default behavior when the handler is not set or does not respond in time is not to show the notification.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M4 4V5.4C4 8.76031 4 10.4405 4.65396 11.7239C5.2292 12.8529 6.14708 13.7708 7.27606 14.346C8.55953 15 10.2397 15 13.6 15H20M15 20L20 15L15 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">void</code></div><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" 6.11984 21 5.27976 20.673 4.63803C20.3854 4.07354 19.9265 3.6146 19.362 3.32698C18.7202 3 17.8802 3 16.2 3H7.8C6.11984 3 5.27976 3 4.63803 3.32698C4.07354 3.6146 3.6146 4.07354 3.32698 4.63803C3 5.27976 3 6.11984 3 7.8V16.2C3 17.8802 3 18.7202 3.32698 19.362C3.6146 19.9265 4.07354 20.3854 4.63803 20.673C5.27976 21 6.11984 21 7.8 21Z"></path></g></svg>Example</span></p><pre data-md-lang="jsx" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword module">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword module">as</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Notifications</span></span> <span class="token keyword module">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-notifications'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

text-palette-blue12 border-palette-blue4"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="translate-z mt-[-0.5px] icon-2xs shrink-0 text-palette-blue12 opacity-80" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="apple-custom-icon"><path id="Vector" fill="currentColor" d="M20.4478 17.3538C20.1312 18.0852 19.7564 18.7585 19.3222 19.3775C18.7303 20.2214 18.2457 20.8055 17.8722 21.1299C17.2933 21.6623 16.673 21.935 16.0088 21.9505C15.5319 21.9505 14.9568 21.8148 14.2874 21.5395C13.6158 21.2656 12.9986 21.1299 12.4343 21.1299C11.8424 21.1299 11.2076 21.2656 10.5287 21.5395C9.84865 21.8148 9.30085 21.9582 6.51416C11.3938 6.82276 11.9217 6.97926 12.1532 6.97926C12.3262 6.97926 12.9127 6.79627 13.9068 6.43145C14.847 6.09313 15.6404 5.95304 16.2905 6.00823C18.0519 6.15038 19.3752 6.84473 20.2552 class="text-xs! leading-none! font-normal whitespace-nowrap">iOS</span></div></span></div></div><div class="table-wrapper mb-4 overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden rounded-md border border-default shadow-xs mx-4 mt-0.5"><table class="w-full rounded-none border-0 text-sm text-default [&amp;_p]:text-sm [&amp;_li]:text-sm [&amp;_span]:text-sm [&amp;_code_span]:text-xs [&amp;_strong]:text-sm [&amp;_blockquote_div]:text-sm [&amp;_blockquote_code]:px-1 [&amp;_blockquote_code]:py-0"><thead class="border-b border-b-default bg-subtle"><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Parameter</th><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Type</th><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true" data-md="api-param-name">taskName</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">string</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0!"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The string you passed to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">TaskManager.defineTask</code> as the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">taskName</code> parameter.</p></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><br/><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Call <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">registerTaskAsync</code> to set a callback (task) that runs when a notification is received while the app is in foreground, background, or terminated.
Only on Android, the task also runs in response to a notification action press when the app is backgrounded or terminated.
When the app is terminated, only a <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/push-notifications/what-you-need-to-know#headless-background-notifications">Headless Background Notification</a> triggers the task execution.
However, the OS may decide not to deliver the notification to your app in some cases (e.g. when the device is in Doze mode on Android, or when you send too many notifications - Apple recommends to not <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://developer.apple.com/documentation/usernotifications/pushing-background-updates-to-your-app#overview">&quot;send more than two or three per hour&quot;</a>).</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Under the hood, this function is run using <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">expo-task-manager</code>. You <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">must</span> define the task first, with <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/task-manager#taskmanagerdefinetasktaskname-taskexecutor"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">TaskManager.defineTask</code></a> and register it with <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">registerTaskAsync</code>.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Make sure you define and register the task in the module scope of a JS module which is required early by your app (e.g. in the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">index.js</code> file).
<code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">expo-task-manager</code> loads your app&#x27;s JS bundle in the background and executes the task, as well as any side effects which may happen as a consequence of requiring any JS modules.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The callback function you define with <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">TaskManager.defineTask</code> receives an object with the following fields:</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0">
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">data</code>: The remote payload delivered by either FCM (Android) or APNs (iOS). See <a href="#notificationtaskpayload" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">NotificationTaskPayload</code></a> for details.</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">error</code>: The error (if any) that occurred during execution of the task.</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">executionInfo</code>: JSON object of additional info related to the task, including the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">taskName</code>.</li>
</ul><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M4 4V5.4C4 8.76031 4 10.4405 4.65396 11.7239C5.2292 12.8529 6.14708 13.7708 7.27606 14.346C8.55953 15 10.2397 15 13.6 15H20M15 20L20 15L15 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise">Promise</a><span class="text-quaternary">&lt;</span><span>null</span><span class="text-quaternary">&gt;</span></code></div><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-secondary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="code-square-01-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14.5 15L17.5 12L14.5 9M9.5 9L6.5 12L9.5 15M7.8 21H16.2C17.8802 21 18.7202 21 19.362 20.673C19.9265 20.3854 20.3854 19.9265 20.673 19.362C21 18.7202 21 17.8802 21 16.2V7.8C21 6.11984 21 5.27976 20.673 4.63803C20.3854 4.07354 19.9265 3.6146 19.362 3.32698C18.7202 3 17.8802 3 16.2 3H7.8C6.11984 3 5.27976 3 4.63803 3.32698C4.07354 3.6146 3.6146 4.07354 3.32698 4.63803C3 5.27976 3 6.11984 3 7.8V16.2C3 17.8802 3 18.7202 3.32698 19.362C3.6146 19.9265 4.07354 20.3854 4.63803 20.673C5.27976 21 6.11984 21 7.8 21Z"></path></g></svg>Example</span></p><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> TaskManager <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-task-manager'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> Notifications <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-notifications'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> <span class="token constant">BACKGROUND_NOTIFICATION_TASK</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">'BACKGROUND-NOTIFICATION-TASK'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

TaskManager<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token generic-function"><span class="token function">defineTask</span><span class="token generic class-name"><span class="token operator">&lt;</span>Notifications<span class="token punctuation">.</span>NotificationTaskPayload<span class="token operator">></span></span></span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token constant">BACKGROUND_NOTIFICATION_TASK</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span> data<span class="token punctuation">,</span> error<span class="token punctuation">,</span> executionInfo <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'Received a notification task payload!'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> isNotificationResponse <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">'actionIdentifier'</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> data<span class="token punctuation">;</span>

  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

[&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise">Promise</a><span class="text-quaternary">&lt;</span><span>null</span><span class="text-quaternary">&gt;</span></code></div></div></div><h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="fetch-information-about-notifications-related-permissions">Fetch information about notifications-related permissions<a href="#fetch-information-about-notifications-related-permissions" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path A <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">0</code> value means that the badge is not displayed.</p>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note:</span> Not all Android launchers support application badges. If the launcher does not support icon badges, the method will always resolve to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">0</code>.</p>

[table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Sets the badge of the app&#x27;s icon to the specified number. Setting it to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">0</code> clears the badge. On iOS, this method requires that you have requested
the user&#x27;s permission for <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">allowBadge</code> via <a href="#requestpermissionsasyncpermissions" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">requestPermissionsAsync</code></a>,
otherwise it will automatically return <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">false</code>.</p>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note:</span> Not all Android launchers support application badges. If the launcher does not support icon badges, the method will resolve to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">false</code>.</p>
