<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note:</span> This does not mean that the notification will be presented when it is triggered.
For the notification to be presented you have to set a notification handler with <a href="#setnotificationhandlerhandler" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">setNotificationHandler</code></a>
that will return an appropriate notification behavior. For more information see the example below.</p>

py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">NotificationChannelGroup</code></a>)
or to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">null</code> if there was no channel group found for this identifier. On platforms that do not support notification channels,
it will always resolve to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Assigns the channel configuration to a channel of a specified name (creating it if need be).
This method lets you assign given notification channel to a notification channel group.</p>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note:</span> After a channel has been created, you can modify only its name and description. This limitation is imposed by the Android OS.</p>
</div></blockquote>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note:</span> For some settings to be applied on all Android versions, it may be necessary to duplicate the configuration across both
a single notification and its respective notification channel.</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">For example, for a notification to play a custom sound on Android versions <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">below</span> 8.0,
the custom notification sound has to be set on the notification (through the <a href="#notificationcontentinput" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">NotificationContentInput</code></a>),
and for the custom sound to play on Android versions <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">above</span> 8.0, the relevant notification channel must have the custom sound configured
(through the <a href="#notificationchannelinput" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">NotificationChannelInput</code></a>). For more information,
see <a href="#set-custom-notification-sounds" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">Set custom notification sounds on Android</a>.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">On iOS, there are two push notification services: &quot;sandbox&quot; and &quot;production&quot;.
This defines whether the push token is supposed to be used with the sandbox platform notification service.
Defaults to <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/application#applicationgetiospushnotificationserviceenvironmentasync"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Application.getIosPushNotificationServiceEnvironmentAsync()</code></a>
exposed by <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">expo-application</code> or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">false</code>. Most probably you won&#x27;t need to customize that.
You may want to customize that if you don&#x27;t want to install <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">expo-application</code> and still use the sandbox APNs.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">deviceId</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">string</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="text-quaternary">-</div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">devicePushToken</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#devicepushtoken" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">DevicePushToken</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The device push token with which to register at the backend.
Defaults to a token fetched with <a href="#getdevicepushtokenasync" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">getDevicePushTokenAsync()</code></a>.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">projectId</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">string</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The ID of the project to which the token should be attributed.
Defaults to <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/versions/v54.0.0/sdk/constants#easconfig"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Constants.expoConfig.extra.eas.projectId</code></a> exposed by <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">expo-constants</code>.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">When using EAS Build, this value is automatically set. However, it is
<span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">recommended</span> to set it manually. Once you have EAS Build configured, you can find
the value in <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">app.json</span> under <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">extra.eas.projectId</code>. You can copy and paste it into your code.

<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The same functionality will be achieved on iOS with a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">CalendarNotificationTrigger</code>.</p>

On Android, this influences whether the notification is shown, a sound is played, and priority. On iOS, this maps directly to <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://developer.apple.com/documentation/usernotifications/unnotificationpresentationoptions"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">UNNotificationPresentationOptions</code></a>.</p>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">On Android, setting <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">shouldPlaySound: false</code> will result in the drop-down notification alert <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">not</span> showing, no matter what the priority is.
This setting will also override any channel-specific sounds you may have configured.</p>

It has content — how it&#x27;s being represented, and a trigger — what triggers the notification.
Many notifications (<a href="#notification" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Notification</code></a>) may be triggered with the same request (for example, a repeating notification).</p></div><div class="table-wrapper mb-4 overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden border-default shadow-xs rounded-none border-0 border-t"><table class="w-full rounded-none border-0 text-sm when the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">day</code>, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">hour</code>, and <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">minute</code> date components match the specified values.</p>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note:</span> All properties are specified in JavaScript <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Date</code> object&#x27;s ranges (i.e. January is represented as 0).</p>

[table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Relative priority for this notification. Priority is an indication of how much of the user&#x27;s valuable attention should be consumed by this notification.
Low-priority notifications may be hidden from the user in certain situations, while the user might be interrupted for a higher-priority notification.
The system will make a determination about how to interpret this priority when presenting the notification.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">vibrationPattern</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">number<!-- -->[]</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">false</code>, the notification will not be automatically dismissed when clicked.
The setting will be used when the value is not provided or is invalid is set to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">true</code>, and the notification
will be dismissed automatically anyway. Corresponds directly to Android&#x27;s <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">setAutoCancel</code> behavior.</p>

Possible values:</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0">
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">&#x27;passive&#x27; - the system adds the notification to the notification list without lighting up the screen or playing a sound</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">&#x27;active&#x27; - the system presents the notification immediately, lights up the screen, and can play a sound</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">&#x27;timeSensitive&#x27; - The system presents the notification immediately, lights up the screen, can play a sound, and breaks through system notification controls</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">&#x27;critical - the system presents the notification immediately, lights up the screen, and bypasses the mute switch to play a sound</li>
</ul></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">launchImageName</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">string</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The name of the image or storyboard to use when your app launches because of the notification.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">priority</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">string</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! Priority is an indication of how much of the user&#x27;s valuable attention should be consumed by this notification.
Low-priority notifications may be hidden from the user in certain situations, while the user might be interrupted for a higher-priority notification.
The system will make a determination about how to interpret this priority when presenting the notification.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">sound</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><span>boolean<span class="text-quaternary"> | </span></span><span>string</span></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="text-quaternary">-</div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">sticky</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">boolean</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! This setting defaults
to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">false</code> if not provided or is invalid. Possible values:</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0">
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">&#x27;passive&#x27; - the system adds the notification to the notification list without lighting up the screen or playing a sound</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">&#x27;active&#x27; - the system presents the notification immediately, lights up the screen, and can play a sound</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">&#x27;timeSensitive&#x27; - The system presents the notification immediately, lights up the screen, can play a sound, and breaks through system notification controls</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">&#x27;critical - the system presents the notification immediately, lights up the screen, and bypasses the mute switch to play a sound</li>
</ul></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">launchImageName</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><span>string<span class="text-quaternary"> | </span></span><span>null</span></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! <blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note:</span> You should not call <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">getDevicePushTokenAsync</code> inside this function, as it triggers the listener and may lead to an infinite loop.</p>

data-text="true"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Literal Type: </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">union</code></p><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Input for time-based, schedulable triggers.
For these triggers you can check the next trigger date with <a href="#getnexttriggerdateasynctrigger" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">getNextTriggerDateAsync</code></a>.
If you pass in a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">number</code> (Unix timestamp) or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Date</code>, it will be processed as a
trigger input of type <a href="#date" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">SchedulableTriggerInputTypes.DATE</code></a>. Otherwise, the input must be
an object, with a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">type</code> value set to one of the allowed values in <a href="#schedulabletriggerinputtypes" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">SchedulableTriggerInputTypes</code></a>.
If the input is an object, date components passed in will be validated, and
an error is thrown if they are outside their allowed range (for example, the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">minute</code> and
<code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">second</code> components must be between 0 and 59 inclusive).</p></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] text-sm font-medium text-tertiary mx-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Acceptable values are:<!-- --> <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true"><a href="#calendartriggerinput" (depends on the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">repeats</code> field) after <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">seconds</code> time elapse.</p>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">On iOS</span>, when <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">repeats</code> is <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">true</code>, the time interval must be 60 seconds or greater.
Otherwise, the notification won&#x27;t be triggered.</p>

<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note:</span> All properties are specified in JavaScript <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Date</code> object&#x27;s ranges (i.e. January is represented as 0).</p>
